allow: Bash(node -e "const j = require\(''jimp''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\(j.Jimp ? ''has Jimp'' : ''no Jimp''\);")
Bash(node -e "const {Jimp}=require\(''jimp''\); const img = new Jimp\({width:16,height:16,color:0xff0000ff}\); console.log\(img.width, img.height, typeof img.setPixelColor\);")
Bash(node -e "const {Jimp}=require\(''jimp''\); const img = new Jimp\({width:16,height:16,color:0xff0000ff}\); console.log\(typeof img.write, typeof img.writeAsync\);")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(typeof p\); console.log\(Object.keys\(p || {}\)\); console.log\(p\)")
Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\(''''pdf-parse''''\); console.log\(''''type:'''', typeof p\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''''ERROR:'''', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(''type:'', typeof p\);")
